Headline: #3 King Drive Temporary Southbound Reroute near King Drive/70th
ShortDescription: Southbound 3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 71st, State, 69th and King Drive: due to, street blockage near King Drive/70th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 71st, State, 69th and King Drive: due to, street blockage near King Drive/70th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Forest Park- Bound Blue Line Service Delayed near Montrose
ShortDescription: Forest Park- Bound Blue Line trains are standing near Montrose. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park- Bound Blue Line trains are standing near Montrose.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#78 Montrose

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
